details.reasoning: Implementation is complete and correct. Checklist: (1) CLI variant `Stats(StatsArgs)` with `human: bool` flag added to `CacheCommand` enum ✓; (2) Command iterates via `CacheBucket::iter_all()` and computes sizes using `DiskUsage::new()` ✓; (3) Function is `pub(crate) fn cache_stats()` returning `Result<ExitStatus>` with `Ok(ExitStatus::Success)` ✓; (4) `--human` flag implemented with `-H` short form, uses `human_readable_bytes()` ✓; (5) Output includes all per-bucket lines with aligned formatting and a Total line ✓; (6) Module registration: `mod cache_stats` and `pub(crate) use cache_stats::cache_stats` in mod.rs ✓; (7) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs matches `CacheCommand::Stats` and calls `commands::cache_stats()` ✓; (8) Follows cache_size patterns: preview warning, printer.stdout_important(), parameter ordering ✓. Helper methods `CacheBucket::name()` and `CacheBucket::iter_all()` properly added. Comprehensive test coverage with empty cache and populated cache tests (both raw and human-readable). Test infrastructure updated with filtered output helpers.
